rationale.R1.5: The agent reorganized the section into a conventional intro flow, tightened prose, and flagged several substantive issues.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainty about actual citation keys for Dawid & Skene, OPEN-CROWD-2024, the 30–46% measurement, or the recent LLM-detection-on-crowd work.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stayed within scope with one minor drift (the identifiability concern is an inference and not a verified failure mode).
rationale.RX.4: The agent identified no regressions; instead, it highlighted potential issues with p_LLM being under-specified and potentially circular.
rationale.RX.5: The agent annotated every non-cosmetic change with source and reason (e.g., the reference set anchoring p_LLM / a small gold-anchored subset / prior concentration on diagonal confusion).
